# HELP coredns_build_info A metric with a constant '1' value labeled by version, revision, and goversion from which CoreDNS was built.
# TYPE coredns_build_info gauge
coredns_build_info{goversion="go1.21.0",revision="abcdef1",version="1.14.0"} 1
# HELP coredns_cache_capacity The cache's capacity.
# TYPE coredns_cache_capacity gauge
coredns_cache_capacity{type="denial"} 10000
coredns_cache_capacity{type="success"} 10000
# HELP coredns_cache_hits_total The count of cache hits.
# TYPE coredns_cache_hits_total counter
coredns_cache_hits_total{server="dns://:53",type="denial"} 100
coredns_cache_hits_total{server="dns://:53",type="success"} 50
# HELP coredns_cache_misses_total The count of cache misses.
# TYPE coredns_cache_misses_total counter
coredns_cache_misses_total{server="dns://:53"} 10
# HELP coredns_cache_requests_total The count of cache requests.
# TYPE coredns_cache_requests_total counter
coredns_cache_requests_total{server="dns://:53"} 160
# HELP coredns_cache_entries The number of elements in the cache.
# TYPE coredns_cache_entries gauge
coredns_cache_entries{server="dns://:53",type="denial"} 5
coredns_cache_entries{server="dns://:53",type="success"} 3
# HELP coredns_cache_evictions_total Counter of cache entries evicted.
# TYPE coredns_cache_evictions_total counter
coredns_cache_evictions_total{server="dns://:53",type="denial"} 2
# HELP coredns_acl_blocked_requests_total Counter of DNS requests being blocked.
# TYPE coredns_acl_blocked_requests_total counter
coredns_acl_blocked_requests_total{server="dns://:53",zone="."} 0
# HELP coredns_acl_allowed_requests_total Counter of DNS requests being allowed.
# TYPE coredns_acl_allowed_requests_total counter
coredns_acl_allowed_requests_total{server="dns://:53",zone="."} 10
# HELP coredns_acl_filtered_requests_total Counter of DNS requests being filtered.
# TYPE coredns_acl_filtered_requests_total counter
coredns_acl_filtered_requests_total{server="dns://:53",zone="."} 1
# HELP coredns_acl_dropped_requests_total Counter of DNS requests being dropped.
# TYPE coredns_acl_dropped_requests_total counter
coredns_acl_dropped_requests_total{server="dns://:53",zone="."} 0
# HELP coredns_dns64_requests_translated_total Counter of DNS requests translated by the dns64 plugin.
# TYPE coredns_dns64_requests_translated_total counter
coredns_dns64_requests_translated_total{server="dns://:53"} 5
# HELP coredns_dns_requests_total Counter of DNS requests made per zone, protocol and family.
# TYPE coredns_dns_requests_total counter
coredns_dns_requests_total{family="1",proto="udp",server="dns://:53",type="A",zone="."} 100
# HELP coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds Histogram of the time (in seconds) each request took per zone.
# TYPE coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds histogram
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="0.00025"} 50
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="0.0005"} 80
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="0.001"} 90
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="0.002"} 95
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="0.004"} 98
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="0.008"} 99
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="0.016"} 100
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="0.032"} 100
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="0.064"} 100
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="0.128"} 100
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="0.256"} 100
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="0.512"} 100
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="1.024"} 100
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="2.048"} 100
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="4.096"} 100
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="8.192"} 100
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_bucket{server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="+Inf"} 100
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_sum{server="dns://:53",zone="."} 0.05
coredns_dns_request_duration_seconds_count{server="dns://:53",zone="."} 100
# HELP coredns_dns_request_size_bytes Size of the EDNS0 UDP buffer in bytes (64K for TCP) per zone and protocol.
# TYPE coredns_dns_request_size_bytes histogram
coredns_dns_request_size_bytes_bucket{proto="udp",server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="0"} 0
coredns_dns_request_size_bytes_bucket{proto="udp",server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="100"} 100
coredns_dns_request_size_bytes_bucket{proto="udp",server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="200"} 100

coredns_dns_request_size_bytes_bucket{proto="udp",server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="16000"} 100

coredns_dns_request_size_bytes_bucket{proto="udp",server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="64000"} 100
coredns_dns_request_size_bytes_bucket{proto="udp",server="dns://:53",zone=".",le="+Inf"} 100

coredns_dns_request_size_bytes_count{proto="udp",server="dns://:53",zone="."} 100

# HELP coredns_dns_responses_total Counter of response status codes.
# TYPE coredns_dns_responses_total counter

coredns_dns_responses_total{rcode="NXDOMAIN",server="dns://:53",zone="."} 5

# TYPE coredns_forward_requests_total counter

# TYPE coredns_forward_responses_total counter

# TYPE go_gc_duration_seconds summary

go_gc_duration_seconds{quantile="0.25"} 0.00015
go_gc_duration_seconds{quantile="0.5"} 0.0002
go_gc_duration_seconds{quantile="0.75"} 0.00025
go_gc_duration_seconds{quantile="1"} 0.0005
go_gc_duration_seconds_sum 0.005
go_gc_duration_seconds_count 20

# TYPE go_goroutines gauge
go_goroutines 25

# TYPE go_info gauge
go_info{version="go1.21.0"} 1
# HELP go_memstats_alloc_bytes Number of bytes allocated and still in use.
# TYPE go_memstats_alloc_bytes gauge
go_memstats_alloc_bytes 1.0e+07

# TYPE go_memstats_alloc_bytes_total counter
go_memstats_alloc_bytes_total 5.0e+08

# TYPE go_memstats_buck_hash_sys_bytes gauge
go_memstats_buck_hash_sys_bytes 1.5e+06
# HELP go_memstats_frees_total Total number of frees.
# TYPE go_memstats_frees_total counter
go_memstats_frees_total 1.0e+06

# TYPE go_memstats_gc_cpu_fraction gauge
go_memstats_gc_cpu_fraction 0.00003

# TYPE go_memstats_gc_sys_bytes gauge
go_memstats_gc_sys_bytes 5.0e+06
# HELP go_memstats_heap_alloc_bytes Number of heap bytes allocated and still in use.
# TYPE go_memstats_heap_alloc_bytes gauge
go_memstats_heap_alloc_bytes 1.0e+07
# HELP go_memstats_heap_idle_bytes Number of heap bytes waiting to be used.
# TYPE go_memstats_heap_idle_bytes gauge
go_memstats_heap_idle_bytes 5.0e+06
# HELP go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes Number of heap bytes that are in use.
# TYPE go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes gauge
go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes 1.1e+07
# HELP go_memstats_heap_objects Number of allocated objects.
# TYPE go_memstats_heap_objects gauge
go_memstats_heap_objects 30000

# TYPE go_memstats_heap_released_bytes gauge
go_memstats_heap_released_bytes 1.0e+06
# HELP go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes Number of heap bytes obtained from system.
# TYPE go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes gauge
go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes 1.6e+07
# HELP go_memstats_last_gc_time_seconds Number of seconds since 1970 of last garbage collection.
# TYPE go_memstats_last_gc_time_seconds gauge
go_memstats_last_gc_time_seconds 1.7e+09
# HELP go_memstats_lookups_total Total number of pointer lookups.
# TYPE go_memstats_lookups_total counter
go_memstats_lookups_total 0
# HELP go_memstats_mallocs_total Total number of mallocs.
# TYPE go_memstats_mallocs_total counter
go_memstats_mallocs_total 1.03e+06
# HELP go_memstats_mcache_inuse_bytes Number of bytes in use by mcache structures.
# TYPE go_memstats_mcache_inuse_bytes gauge
go_memstats_mcache_inuse_bytes 7200

# TYPE go_memstats_mcache_sys_bytes gauge
go_memstats_mcache_sys_bytes 16384

# TYPE go_memstats_mspan_inuse_bytes gauge
go_memstats_mspan_inuse_bytes 150000

# TYPE go_memstats_mspan_sys_bytes gauge
go_memstats_mspan_sys_bytes 163840

# TYPE go_memstats_next_gc_bytes gauge
go_memstats_next_gc_bytes 1.5e+07
# HELP go_memstats_other_sys_bytes Number of bytes used for other system allocations.
# TYPE go_memstats_other_sys_bytes gauge
go_memstats_other_sys_bytes 1.4e+06
# HELP go_memstats_stack_inuse_bytes Number of bytes in use by the stack allocator.
# TYPE go_memstats_stack_inuse_bytes gauge
go_memstats_stack_inuse_bytes 8.0e+05
# HELP go_memstats_stack_sys_bytes Number of bytes obtained from system for stack allocator.
# TYPE go_memstats_stack_sys_bytes gauge
go_memstats_stack_sys_bytes 8.0e+05
# HELP go_memstats_sys_bytes Number of bytes obtained from system.
# TYPE go_memstats_sys_bytes gauge
go_memstats_sys_bytes 2.5e+07
# HELP process_cpu_seconds_total Total user and system CPU time spent in seconds.
# TYPE process_cpu_seconds_total counter
process_cpu_seconds_total 5.0
# HELP process_max_fds Maximum number of open file descriptors.
# TYPE process_max_fds gauge
process_max_fds 1.048576e+06
# HELP process_open_fds Number of open file descriptors.
# TYPE process_open_fds gauge
process_open_fds 15
# HELP process_resident_memory_bytes Resident memory size in bytes.
# TYPE process_resident_memory_bytes gauge
process_resident_memory_bytes 5.0e+07
# HELP process_start_time_seconds Start time of the process since unix epoch in seconds.
# TYPE process_start_time_seconds gauge
process_start_time_seconds 1.7e+09
# HELP process_virtual_memory_bytes Virtual memory size in bytes.
# TYPE process_virtual_memory_bytes gauge
process_virtual_memory_bytes 8.0e+08
